---
description: An oversized deployment command
---

## Name
context-budget:mega-deploy

## Synopsis
```
/context-budget:mega-deploy
```

## Description
This command performs a comprehensive deployment across all environments.

## Implementation
1. Execute deployment step 1: validate configuration parameters, check environment variables, verify service health, update routing tables, and confirm rollout status for component 1
2. Execute deployment step 2: validate configuration parameters, check environment variables, verify service health, update routing tables, and confirm rollout status for component 2
3. Execute deployment step 3: validate configuration parameters, check environment variables, verify service health, update routing tables, and confirm rollout status for component 3
